---
title: "Kodjo Aklobessi"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kodjo.aklobessi@umontreal.ca
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kaklobessi
---

I am a PhD candidate in Economics at the **Université de Montréal**. My research lies at the intersection of public finance, labor economics, and household behavior.

My work focuses on how tax policy shapes labor supply decisions within households, the role of informal insurance mechanisms, and resource misallocation in developing economies.

---

### Research Interests

- Public Finance & Taxation
- Labor Supply & Household Economics
- Development Economics
- Structural Macroeconomics
